input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.6.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.6.2
            TITLE: the driver will drive approximately half of the endurance distance

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.6.2: The driver will drive approximately half of the Endurance distance
D.12.6.2 The driver will drive approximately half of the Endurance distance

final_answer: The driver will drive approximately half of the Endurance distance
